name: for_markdown
description: Markdown paste/import plugin for TinyMCE (FriendsOfREDAXO, free & open-source)

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_markdown/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/for_markdown/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_markdown/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/for_markdown/

author: FriendsOfREDAXO
